entities.name: drop-followup

entities.name: n5_drop_followup.py
entities.context: Python script that implements the drop-followup functionality in N5/scripts/

entities.name: unsent-followups-digest
entities.context: Digest system that sends reminders for pending follow-up emails

entities.name: follow-up email
entities.context: Communication practice of following up with stakeholders after meetings

entities.name: Stakeholder
entities.context: People who receive follow-up communications (referenced in usage examples)

relationships.context: The drop-followup tool is implemented via the n5_drop_followup.py script
Script updates metadata to exclude items from the digest
Tool manages the lifecycle of follow-up email reminders
Stakeholders are the recipients of follow-up emails
